creator: james@jraynard.demon.co.uk
text:
Left computer unattended (and idle) for about 20 minutes to build a
debug kernel. On return, copied and stripped kernel, then did 'make
install' which resulted in a panic.

As I had just clobbered the unstripped version of the old kernel, I
was not able to get any meaningful information from kgdb. However, I
managed to note the following while in DDB:-

panic: vm_page_free: pindex(0), busy(0), PG_BUSY(0), hold(21)
trace:
_panic
_vm_page_freechk_and_unqueue
_vm_page_free_zero
_pmap_release
_vmspace_free
_cpu_wait
_wait1
_wait4
_syscall
_Xsyscall
syscall 7
